brand_identity.name: Legacy
brand_identity.visual_style: High-Contrast Professional, Deep Navy Anchors, Teal Energy
brand_identity.description: A premium consultancy firm offering strategic wisdom and legacy-building services. The design must feel established yet modern.

primary.name: Legacy Navy
primary.usage: Main anchor, Footer, Headings, Primary Buttons

accent.name: Strategic Teal
accent.usage: Call to Actions, Highlights, Icons, Progress Bars

hero.alt: Confident professional consultant in white coat

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-teal-700 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-primary/10 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-sm border border-slate-100 shadow-card hover:border-teal-100 hover:shadow-float transition-all duration-300 group
cards.pricing: bg-white p-10 rounded-sm border-t-4 border-teal-600 shadow-card relative overflow-hidden

public_pages.hero: Split layout: Text Left (60%) + Image Right (40%) with overlapping elements. Use deep navy background for Hero.
public_pages.services: Grid 3-col. Cards with large icons (48px) in Teal. Hover state lifts card.
public_pages.gallery: Masonry Layout using columns-1 md:columns-2 lg:columns-3 gap-8. Images have distinct hover overlay with details.
public_pages.map: Full width container h-[500px] using Leaflet. Custom marker styles in Teal.
public_pages.footer: Dark Navy background (#1a2332). White text. 4 Column grid. 'Get Updates' section prominent.

admin_dashboard.structure: Sidebar Left (Fixed, Navy) + Content Right (Fluid, Light Grey).
admin_dashboard.tables: Clean rows, alternating stripe (slate-50), distinct headers.

functionality_specs.map: Use 'react-leaflet'. Center on a major business hub. Custom markers.
functionality_specs.stripe: Integrate Stripe Elements for 'Services' and 'Products' checkout. Use test mode keys.
functionality_specs.auth: JWT based. Login page should be minimal: Navy background left, White form right.
functionality_specs.cms: Admin panel must edit: Hero Text, About Content, Services List, Blog Posts. Use forms with 'react-hook-form'.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (H1-H3). Use 'Manrope' for body.
Primary Color is Navy (#1a2332). Accent is Teal (#0D9488). Avoid generic blue.
No gradients on text. Use gradients only for subtle background glows.
Buttons must be 'rounded-sm' (sharp corners) to feel professional/legacy.
Use 2x padding. If you think 'p-4' is enough, use 'p-8'. Consultant sites need breathing room.
Animations: Use 'framer-motion' for simple fade-ins on scroll. Do not over-animate.
Images: Use the provided URLs. Do not leave empty src tags.
Test IDs: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'Legacy'. This is not a startup; it is an established consultancy. Design must reflect stability. 1. Install 'lucide-react', 'framer-motion', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge', 'react-leaflet', 'leaflet'. 2. Create the 'design_guidelines.json' first (done). 3. Set up the Tailwind config to use the Navy/Teal/Slate palette. 4. Build components with the 'rounded-sm' radius. 5. Ensure the Admin panel is distinct from the public site (Dense vs Spacious).
